items.title: Written practice
items.body:
Translate the workbook prompts into English. Use the patterns you studied.

Examples:
• Eu trabalho no mercado à tarde.
• Eu não bebo café e leite com meus filhos à noite.
• Eu não bebo chá, mas eu bebo suco. / Obrigado.
• Eu estudo com meu filho e minha filha de manhã.
• Eu não trabalho com meu pai à noite.

items.prompt: I don’t drink coffee in the morning, but I drink tea.
items.answer: I drink coffee in the morning.

items.prompt: I don’t eat cheese in the afternoon, but I eat bread and ham.
items.answer: I eat cheese in the afternoon.

items.prompt: I don’t work with my father, but I work with my brother.
I don’t play the piano, but I play the guitar.

items.answer: 4- I work with my friend at school

items.text: I drink coffee in the morning.
I eat cheese in the afternoon.
